reviews.review_description: It is a great game that only works in VR.

reviews.review_title: Great game . Lots of levels. Easy 4 kids
reviews.review_description:
My oldest son loves this game it was easy for him to get the hang of the controllers . He's autistic so some games have control schemes that are just too difficult for him to master. He really got the hang of this and enjoyed it. He did get frustrated at first trying to figure out how to scale the level. It would be cool to have an option to lock the scale you want it at so you don't accidentally change the size while trying to navigate around the map. It would also be cool if you implemented a teleport option to get closer to your squishie faster .
There are a lot of levels and you get your money worth with this title . I highly recommend

Only had it a few days and soooooòooo much fun. Lots of levels. Hope to see more! Kids are having a blast!Totally worth it. Not too pricey.I have bought $20 and $30 games that weren't as fun. It's kinda like Vrosty.And I usually don't give reviews let alone 5 stars. Great job devs.

Guys ty for for developing this game! And if y’all love games like max mustard and Lucky u will lov this one. And can play seated but need a tad room to adjust your location along the way like God mode type games u can scale and make way bigger or the opposite but still getting the hang of it along with the suck and blow controls but easy enough to get used to quickly🙂 ive only played a couple levels and got way more to go 👍🏼 it’s headscatching and  pretty challenging from the get go tho, as in figuring out where the enter and exits r and what all u hav to do to accomplish that level but don’t mind a bit caus feels like I’m getting a platformer and puzzle game and ive already had  fun trying to figur out how to do it without giving u hints on what to do!! The enter and exits r the funniest looking characters and the squishies r too 🥰 (Check out their appearance after they die ALOT😝)  the environments r vibrant and very detailed. If u look closely around u can find other characters that r hard to notice at first and give them a blow or 2 made me chuckle a bit 😆 It’s truely is a one of a kind so had to jump on here quickly and make sur mor people will get to experience this cute and,what I would call a hidden and highly recommended hidden gem of a game! Giving it the credit it very much deserves! So BRAVO DEVS can’twait to c what’s next to come!!👍🏼 Hit me up if wanna discount will do I check daily on friend request so will do asap! U won’t regret buying this game!
